TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ko-li Taywan po-o-kowang O nipatirengan no kitakit kona ko-li Taywan po-o-kowan (o tay-po, tay-po-kowan, Taywan po-o-kowan ko roma a ngangan nira.) I ka'amis no 228 kining kong-yeng ko kamaro'an nira, o con-howa-min-ko on-howa-po ko mikowanany. I kaDipongan a mapatireng, o sa'ayaway a po-o-kowan i Taywan, o ka'ayaw nira a ngangan i, o Taywan cong-to-fo po-o-kowan, o mapatoro'ay no con-howa-min-ko to no litengan ho a nipatirengan. kasarayray 1889 a mihecaan, mipatireng to Taywan cong-to-fo min-cen-po pirayarayan to dafong a loma'. 1908 miheca 10 folad 24 a romi'ad, falicen ko ngangan to Taywan cong-to-fo min-cen-po cen-can-ci mihawikidan patireng a po-o-kowan. 1913 miheca(saka2 a miheca no ta-cen no Dipong, o tapang Co-cen-se sapikiningaw ci I-yin-tay-langan o wawa no saka4 a tapng no Taywan cong-to-fo ato ci o-teng-sing-pin o tapang no min-cen-po, mansa misolot cira to payso i finawlan to 256,101 payso no Dipong, o sapatireng to sakikining a loma' nona tatosaay, ona loma' i, itiraay i kaitiraan no Taypak ta-tin-ho-kong itiyaho (1912 miheca mapihiw no faliyos matastasay to, o 228 kong-yen to anini). Papisafacoen no Taywan cong-to-fo ko misafocoay to loma' a tamdaw o Dipong ci Yi-con-i-lang ato ci howang-mo-long , o mahecaday to no Si-la a kitakit ko hecek noya nisanga'an a loma', o roma sato, nitodongan naira ko pinangan no pisanga' to loma' i pa-lo-ke ti'eror , i 1915 miheca a malaheci misanga'halo micomod tona loma'. 1949 miheca, kaikor no saka2 hekal kalalood, micada a mikowan ko cong-howa-min-ko to Taywan, itiya mafalic ko Taywan cong-to-fo to Taywan-sen po-o-kowan , o Taywan-sen sin-cen-cang-kowan-kong-so ko mikowanay; miliyaw a mifalic to ngangan to Taywan sen-li po-o-kowan , o Taywan sen-cen-fo ko mikowananay. 1999 miheca, awaay to ko Taywan sen-cen-fo , o sing-cen-yen wen-howa-cin-se woy-yin-hoy (o cong-howa-min-ko wen-howa-po to anini ) ko mikowanay, miliyaw haca mafalic ko ngangan to ko-li Taywan po-o-kowang . Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: ko~u-ɾi tajwan po~u-o~u-ko~uwaŋ o~u nipatirəŋan no~u kitakit ko~una ko~u-ɾi tajwan po~u-o~u-ko~uwan (o~u taj-po~u, taj-po~u-ko~uwan, tajwan po~u-o~u-ko~uwan ko~u ro~uma a ŋaŋan nira.) i kaʡamis no~u *** kiniŋ ko~uŋ-jəŋ ko~u kamaro~uʡan nira, o~u ʦo~un-ħo~uwa-min-ko~u o~un-ħo~uwa-po~u ko~u miko~uwananj. i kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a mapatirəŋ, o~u saʡajawaj a po~u-o~u-ko~uwan i tajwan, o~u kaʡajaw nira a ŋaŋan i, o~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u po~u-o~u-ko~uwan, o~u mapato~uro~uʡaj no~u ʦo~un-ħo~uwa-min-ko~u to~u no~u ɾitəŋan ħo~u a nipatirəŋan. kasarajraj **** a miħəʦaan, mipatirəŋ to~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u min-ʦən-po~u pirajarajan to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ a ɾo~umaʡ. **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, faɾiʦən ko~u ŋaŋan to~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u min-ʦən-po~u ʦən-ʦan-ʦi miħawikiɬ~ɮan patirəŋ a po~u-o~u-ko~uwan. **** miħəʦa(saka* a miħəʦa no~u ta-ʦən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u tapaŋ ʦo~u-ʦən-sə sapikiniŋaw ʦi i-jin-taj-ɾaŋan o~u wawa no~u saka* a tapŋ no~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u ato~u ʦi o~u-təŋ-siŋ-pin o~u tapaŋ no~u min-ʦən-po~u, mansa miso~uɾo~ut ʦira to~u pajso~u i finawɾan to~u ***,*** pajso~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u sapatirəŋ to~u sakikiniŋ a ɾo~umaʡ no~una tato~usaaj, o~una ɾo~umaʡ i, itiraaj i kaitiraan no~u tajpak ta-tin-ħo~u-ko~uŋ itijaħo~u (**** miħəʦa mapiħiw no~u faɾijo~us matastasaj to~u, o~u *** ko~uŋ-jən to~u anini). papisafaʦo~uən no~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u ko~u misafo~uʦo~uaj to~u ɾo~umaʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ji-ʦo~un-i-ɾaŋ ato~u ʦi ħo~uwaŋ-mo~u-ɾo~uŋ , o~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u no~u si-ɾa a kitakit ko~u ħəʦək no~uja nisaŋaʡan a ɾo~umaʡ, o~u ro~uma sato~u, nito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan naira ko~u pinaŋan no~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ɾo~umaʡ i pa-ɾo~u-kə tiʡəro~ur , i **** miħəʦa a maɾaħəʦi misaŋaʡħaɾo~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~una ɾo~umaʡ. **** miħəʦa, kaiko~ur no~u saka* ħəkaɾ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, miʦaɬ~ɮa a miko~uwan ko~u ʦo~uŋ-ħo~uwa-min-ko~u to~u tajwan, itija mafaɾiʦ ko~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u to~u tajwan-sən po~u-o~u-ko~uwan , o~u tajwan-sən sin-ʦən-ʦaŋ-ko~uwan-ko~uŋ-so~u ko~u miko~uwanaj; miɾijaw a mifaɾiʦ to~u ŋaŋan to~u tajwan sən-ɾi po~u-o~u-ko~uwan , o~u tajwan sən-ʦən-fo~u ko~u miko~uwananaj. **** miħəʦa, awaaj to~u ko~u tajwan sən-ʦən-fo~u , o~u siŋ-ʦən-jən wən-ħo~uwa-ʦin-sə wo~uj-jin-ħo~uj (o~u ʦo~uŋ-ħo~uwa-min-ko~u wən-ħo~uwa-po~u to~u anini ) ko~u miko~uwanaj, miɾijaw ħaʦa mafaɾiʦ ko~u ŋaŋan to~u ko~u-ɾi tajwan po~u-o~u-ko~uwaŋ . piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
S.FORM: ko-li Taywan po-o-kowang O nipatirengan no kitakit kona ko-li Taywan po-o-kowan (o tay-po, tay-po-kowan, Taywan po-o-kowan ko roma a ngangan nira.) I ka'amis no 228 kining kong-yeng ko kamaro'an nira, o con-howa-min-ko on-howa-po ko mikowanany. I kaDipongan a mapatireng, o sa'ayaway a po-o-kowan i Taywan, o ka'ayaw nira a ngangan i, o Taywan cong-to-fo po-o-kowan, o mapatoro'ay no con-howa-min-ko to no litengan ho a nipatirengan. kasarayray 1889 a mihecaan, mipatireng to Taywan cong-to-fo min-cen-po pirayarayan to dafong a loma'. 1908 miheca 10 folad 24 a romi'ad, falicen ko ngangan to Taywan cong-to-fo min-cen-po cen-can-ci mihawikidan patireng a po-o-kowan. 1913 miheca(saka2 a miheca no ta-cen no Dipong, o tapang Co-cen-se sapikiningaw ci I-yin-tay-langan o wawa no saka4 a tapng no Taywan cong-to-fo ato ci o-teng-sing-pin o tapang no min-cen-po, mansa misolot cira to payso i finawlan to 256,101 payso no Dipong, o sapatireng to sakikining a loma' nona tatosaay, ona loma' i, itiraay i kaitiraan no Taypak ta-tin-ho-kong itiyaho (1912 miheca mapihiw no faliyos matastasay to, o 228 kong-yen to anini). Papisafacoen no Taywan cong-to-fo ko misafocoay to loma' a tamdaw o Dipong ci Yi-con-i-lang ato ci howang-mo-long , o mahecaday to no Si-la a kitakit ko hecek noya nisanga'an a loma', o roma sato, nitodongan naira ko pinangan no pisanga' to loma' i pa-lo-ke ti'eror , i 1915 miheca a malaheci misanga'halo micomod tona loma'. 1949 miheca, kaikor no saka2 hekal kalalood, micada a mikowan ko cong-howa-min-ko to Taywan, itiya mafalic ko Taywan cong-to-fo to Taywan-sen po-o-kowan , o Taywan-sen sin-cen-cang-kowan-kong-so ko mikowanay; miliyaw a mifalic to ngangan to Taywan sen-li po-o-kowan , o Taywan sen-cen-fo ko mikowananay. 1999 miheca, awaay to ko Taywan sen-cen-fo , o sing-cen-yen wen-howa-cin-se woy-yin-hoy (o cong-howa-min-ko wen-howa-po to anini ) ko mikowanay, miliyaw haca mafalic ko ngangan to ko-li Taywan po-o-kowang . Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: ko~u-ɾi tajwan po~u-o~u-ko~uwaŋ o~u nipatirəŋan no~u kitakit ko~una ko~u-ɾi tajwan po~u-o~u-ko~uwan (o~u taj-po~u, taj-po~u-ko~uwan, tajwan po~u-o~u-ko~uwan ko~u ro~uma a ŋaŋan nira.) i kaʡamis no~u *** kiniŋ ko~uŋ-jəŋ ko~u kamaro~uʡan nira, o~u ʦo~un-ħo~uwa-min-ko~u o~un-ħo~uwa-po~u ko~u miko~uwananj. i kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a mapatirəŋ, o~u saʡajawaj a po~u-o~u-ko~uwan i tajwan, o~u kaʡajaw nira a ŋaŋan i, o~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u po~u-o~u-ko~uwan, o~u mapato~uro~uʡaj no~u ʦo~un-ħo~uwa-min-ko~u to~u no~u ɾitəŋan ħo~u a nipatirəŋan. kasarajraj **** a miħəʦaan, mipatirəŋ to~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u min-ʦən-po~u pirajarajan to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ a ɾo~umaʡ. **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, faɾiʦən ko~u ŋaŋan to~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u min-ʦən-po~u ʦən-ʦan-ʦi miħawikiɬ~ɮan patirəŋ a po~u-o~u-ko~uwan. **** miħəʦa(saka* a miħəʦa no~u ta-ʦən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u tapaŋ ʦo~u-ʦən-sə sapikiniŋaw ʦi i-jin-taj-ɾaŋan o~u wawa no~u saka* a tapŋ no~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u ato~u ʦi o~u-təŋ-siŋ-pin o~u tapaŋ no~u min-ʦən-po~u, mansa miso~uɾo~ut ʦira to~u pajso~u i finawɾan to~u ***,*** pajso~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~u sapatirəŋ to~u sakikiniŋ a ɾo~umaʡ no~una tato~usaaj, o~una ɾo~umaʡ i, itiraaj i kaitiraan no~u tajpak ta-tin-ħo~u-ko~uŋ itijaħo~u (**** miħəʦa mapiħiw no~u faɾijo~us matastasaj to~u, o~u *** ko~uŋ-jən to~u anini). papisafaʦo~uən no~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u ko~u misafo~uʦo~uaj to~u ɾo~umaʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ji-ʦo~un-i-ɾaŋ ato~u ʦi ħo~uwaŋ-mo~u-ɾo~uŋ , o~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u no~u si-ɾa a kitakit ko~u ħəʦək no~uja nisaŋaʡan a ɾo~umaʡ, o~u ro~uma sato~u, nito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan naira ko~u pinaŋan no~u pisaŋaʡ to~u ɾo~umaʡ i pa-ɾo~u-kə tiʡəro~ur , i **** miħəʦa a maɾaħəʦi misaŋaʡħaɾo~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~una ɾo~umaʡ. **** miħəʦa, kaiko~ur no~u saka* ħəkaɾ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, miʦaɬ~ɮa a miko~uwan ko~u ʦo~uŋ-ħo~uwa-min-ko~u to~u tajwan, itija mafaɾiʦ ko~u tajwan ʦo~uŋ-to~u-fo~u to~u tajwan-sən po~u-o~u-ko~uwan , o~u tajwan-sən sin-ʦən-ʦaŋ-ko~uwan-ko~uŋ-so~u ko~u miko~uwanaj; miɾijaw a mifaɾiʦ to~u ŋaŋan to~u tajwan sən-ɾi po~u-o~u-ko~uwan , o~u tajwan sən-ʦən-fo~u ko~u miko~uwananaj. **** miħəʦa, awaaj to~u ko~u tajwan sən-ʦən-fo~u , o~u siŋ-ʦən-jən wən-ħo~uwa-ʦin-sə wo~uj-jin-ħo~uj (o~u ʦo~uŋ-ħo~uwa-min-ko~u wən-ħo~uwa-po~u to~u anini ) ko~u miko~uwanaj, miɾijaw ħaʦa mafaɾiʦ ko~u ŋaŋan to~u ko~u-ɾi tajwan po~u-o~u-ko~uwaŋ . piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
